title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that successfully predicted Hurricane Melissa's intensity and track in October 2025, providing early warnings to meteorologists and authorities. The model enabled evacuation decisions days ahead of the Category 5 storm's Jamaica landfall in collaboration with the National Hurricane Center.
